Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert F. Kane, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-982-1510), for Terminal Plaza Associates LP, Plaintiff and moving party.
Ann Rankin, Esq., Attorney at Law, (510-653-8886), for 2106 Jackson Street Associates, Inc., Defendant and opposing party.

Court receives the Declaration by Defendant prior to the hearing. In open court, hearing is held. Arguments from both sides are heard. Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction is taken under submission. Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
